final:
module logic_circuit (
    input e,
    input f,
    input g,
    input h,
    output reg u);assign u = ~e&~f&g&~h | e&~f&g&h | e&f&g&~h | e&~f&~g&~h;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      u <= ~e & ~f & g & ~h; u <= e & ~f & g & h; u <= e & f & g & ~h; u <= e & ~f & ~g & ~h;
    end
  end

endmodule
